# Students Voice — MUSE

> Anonymous, peer-moderated complaint platform for students of Mysore University School of Engineering (MUSE). Posts stay anonymous; verified complaints are compiled into an anonymised PDF letter for college leadership.

Students sign in with a registered USN, post a complaint tagged by location and issue type, and other verified students vote True or False. Once a post reaches a 30-vote quorum, it is verified at 70% True or removed at 70% False.

## Pages

- [Home](/): landing page with the latest public complaint feed and verified complaint count.
- [Verified complaints](/verified): archive of complaints that reached the credibility threshold.
- [How it works](/about): posting rules, quorum, verification threshold, and escalation flow.
- [Complaint writing guide](/complaint-guide): how to structure an effective formal complaint to a university.
- [Privacy & anonymity](/privacy): how USNs and identities are stored and protected.
- [Terms of use](/terms): platform terms and content rules.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): machine-readable list of indexable routes.

Contact: studentsvoice.muse@gmail.com
